meaning: adj.基于信用的,信托的,受信托的n.被信托者,受托人
examples: They have a case against their directors for breach of fiduciary duty.
He was acting in a fiduciary capacity.
Illustration showing two axes: fiduciary visibily and strategic versus tactical
Cornyn is looking into whether the lawyers breached their fiduciary duties to a client, Texas.
Obviously pensions have a fiduciary obligation to manage assets in the best interests of their beneficiaries.
